summary: An AS is registered in Foretaksregisteret; the base register document is the firmaattest (a registerutskrift), issued by Brønnøysundregistrene and showing org number, name, address, board/managing director, signature/procuration and share capital. Orderable as a digital PDF (free online).

evidence.quote: Certificates of registration from the Register of Business Enterprises and Register transcripts from the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities show that an organisation is registered and who is responsible for it.

caveats: The firmaattest evidences the entity, its officers and share capital, but NOT the identity of shareholders.

summary: There is NO shareholder-evidencing document issued by the commercial register. Brønnøysundregistrene holds no shareholder data. The aksjeeierbok (shareholder register, aksjeloven §4-5) is kept by the company itself and is open to inspection at the company (§4-6), but it is not a registry-issued document. Separately, shareholder data is reported annually to Skatteetaten's aksjonærregisteret; anyone may request an extract, but it is delivered as a caveated .csv data file (available only in May of the following year), not an authoritative certified document.

evidence.quote: The Brønnøysund Register Centre does not keep any record of shareholders.
evidence.note: brreg explicitly disclaims holding shareholder data; directs to the company / Tax Administration.
§4-5: the board must keep an updated aksjeeierbok; §4-6: anyone has the right of inspection into the aksjeeierbok — but this is inspection AT THE COMPANY, not a registry document.

evidence.quote: Alle kan få tilgang til opplysninger om aksjeeiere i aksjonærregisteret
evidence.note: Public access exists but delivery is a downloadable .csv data extract, not a certified document; opens ~May of the year after the tax year.

evidence.quote: Det kan forekomme feil eller ufullstendige opplysninger
evidence.note: Skatteetaten itself flags the data as possibly erroneous/incomplete — not authoritative proof.

caveats: CONFLICT of concepts: distinguish (a) the company-kept aksjeeierbok — a real document but held by the company, inspectable under §4-6, NOT obtainable from any registry; from (b) the tax aksjonærregisteret — publicly accessible but delivered as raw .csv DATA that Skatteetaten warns may be wrong/incomplete and is ~4 months stale. Neither is a commercial-register proof document.
INFERENCE: framed strictly as 'a document is the proof, parsed data is not a substitute', the honest status is not_provable_from_registry.

documentLabel: Articles of association / Memorandum of association
summary: Vedtekter (articles) are a mandatory attachment for AS registration and, together with the stiftelsesdokument (memorandum of association), are filed with Foretaksregisteret. They are not part of the standard firmaattest but are separately obtainable as copies of case documents (saksdokumenter) via the brreg webshop.

evidence.basis: Brønnøysundregistrene – Information about our products (copies of case documents)
evidence.quote: Copies of case documents are documents that have been submitted to us in connection with registrations and registrations of legal rights at the Brønnøysund Register Centre.
evidence.note: Examples include 'Memorandum of association' (stiftelsesdokument); vedtekter for AS are attached to/part of the stiftelsesdokument and filed at registration.

evidence.basis: Brønnøysundregistrene – Attachment requirements for limited companies
evidence.note: AS registration requires stiftelsesdokument and vedtekter to be attached.

caveats: Obtained as a copy of the filed case document, not a live register printout — reflects the version on file, which may pre-date later amendments unless the latest amendment was also filed.

summary: An ASA is registered in Foretaksregisteret; the base register document is the firmaattest / registerutskrift issued by Brønnøysundregistrene, same product as for an AS.

evidence.quote: Certificates of registration from the Register of Business Enterprises and Register transcripts from the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities show that an organisation is registered and who is responsible for it.

caveats: Evidences the entity and its officers, not shareholders.

documentLocal: aksjeeierregister i verdipapirsentral (Euronext Securities Oslo/VPS) / aksjonærregisteret (Skatteetaten)
summary: Not provable from the commercial register. For an ASA the shareholder register (aksjeeierregister) is held in a securities depository — Euronext Securities Oslo (VPS) — under allmennaksjeloven §4-4, not at Brønnøysundregistrene. It is open to anyone (§4-5) but through the VPS/company, not as a Brønnøysund document. Shareholder data is also reported to Skatteetaten's aksjonærregisteret and obtainable as a caveated .csv extract — data, not a certified document.

evidence.note: ASA shareholder register (aksjeeierregister) must be established in a securities depository (VPS/Euronext Securities Oslo); §4-5 makes it open to anyone — held at the depository, not the commercial register.

evidence.quote: The Brønnøysund Register Centre does not keep any record of shareholders.
Det kan forekomme feil eller ufullstendige opplysninger
evidence.note: Tax-route data explicitly flagged as possibly erroneous/incomplete.

caveats: CONFLICT of concepts: the authoritative live shareholder register for an ASA sits in the VPS/Euronext Securities Oslo, NOT in Brønnøysundregistrene and NOT the tax aksjonærregisteret. Neither the VPS register nor the tax .csv is a commercial-register proof document.

documentLabel: Articles of association / Memorandum of association
summary: Vedtekter and stiftelsesdokument are mandatory registration attachments filed with Foretaksregisteret and separately obtainable as copies of case documents via the brreg webshop, same as for an AS.

evidence.basis: Brønnøysundregistrene – Information about our products (copies of case documents)
evidence.quote: Copies of case documents are documents that have been submitted to us in connection with registrations and registrations of legal rights at the Brønnøysund Register Centre.

caveats: Copy of the filed version; may pre-date later amendments unless amendments were also filed.

summary: An ANS (general partnership, full joint liability) is registered in Foretaksregisteret; the firmaattest / registerutskrift is the base register document.

evidence.quote: Certificates of registration from the Register of Business Enterprises and Register transcripts from the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities show that an organisation is registered and who is responsible for it.

documentLabel: Names of participants (shown on the register extract)
summary: Unlike an AS/ASA, the OWNERS of an ANS — the participants (deltakere) with personal liability — are registered in Foretaksregisteret and MUST appear on the firmaattest. So current owners are evidenced by the base register document itself.

evidence.basis: Forskrift om registrering av foretak §13 (firmaattestens innhold), Lovdata
evidence.quote: Navn på deltakerne i ansvarlig selskap og EØFG.
evidence.note: The firmaattest for an ansvarlig selskap must state the names of the participants (deltakere).

caveats: This evidences the personally-liable participants (deltakere), the ANS analogue of shareholders — a genuine distinction from AS/ASA. Ownership percentages/interest splits may not be fully detailed on the firmaattest; the selskapsavtale gives the detailed shares.

summary: An ANS has a selskapsavtale (partnership agreement, required under selskapsloven), not vedtekter. It is filed at registration and obtainable as a copy of a case document (saksdokument) via the brreg webshop.

evidence.basis: Brønnøysundregistrene – Information about our products (copies of case documents)
evidence.quote: Copies of case documents are documents that have been submitted to us in connection with registrations and registrations of legal rights at the Brønnøysund Register Centre.

caveats: UNVERIFIED whether a selskapsavtale is on file in every case: it is required by selskapsloven and normally filed, but availability depends on what was actually submitted; obtained copy is the filed version and may pre-date amendments.

summary: A DA (partnership with divided/pro-rata liability) is registered in Foretaksregisteret; the firmaattest / registerutskrift is the base register document. Same rules as ANS except liability is split by fraction.

evidence.quote: Certificates of registration from the Register of Business Enterprises and Register transcripts from the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities show that an organisation is registered and who is responsible for it.

documentLabel: Names of participants (shown on the register extract)
summary: As with an ANS, the participants (deltakere) of a DA are registered in Foretaksregisteret and must appear on the firmaattest, so current owners are evidenced by the base register document.

evidence.basis: Forskrift om registrering av foretak §13 (firmaattestens innhold), Lovdata
evidence.quote: Navn på deltakerne i ansvarlig selskap og EØFG.
evidence.note: 'Ansvarlig selskap' in the forskrift covers both ANS and DA.

caveats: Evidences the participants; the pro-rata liability shares / detailed ownership splits are in the selskapsavtale rather than always fully on the firmaattest.

summary: A DA has a selskapsavtale (partnership agreement under selskapsloven), filed at registration and obtainable as a copy of a case document via the brreg webshop.

evidence.basis: Brønnøysundregistrene – Information about our products (copies of case documents)
evidence.quote: Copies of case documents are documents that have been submitted to us in connection with registrations and registrations of legal rights at the Brønnøysund Register Centre.

caveats: UNVERIFIED per-case availability; obtained copy is the filed version and may pre-date amendments.
